info.title: SportStock API
info.description:
SportStock REST API: sports-team style assets, portfolios, and **tick-based** simulated trading.

## JSON naming
Most payloads under `/api` use **camelCase** in JSON when served by models in `app.schemas.api` (e.g. `stockId`, `pendingOrderId`).
**Exception:** `UserResponse` from **`POST /api/users`**, **`GET/PATCH /api/users/me`** uses **snake_case** keys (`user_id`, `profile_picture_url`, …). Query parameters often expose camelCase aliases (`leagueID`, `stockID`).

## Authentication
Send **`Authorization: Bearer <JWT>`** on routes that require authentication.
- **Production**: use the Cognito **ID token** (not the access token); the API validates via JWKS.
- **Local dev**: when `DEV_USE_X_USER_ID` is enabled, you may send **`X-User-Id: <user-id>`** instead of Bearer.

## Errors
Error bodies are shaped as `{"error": {"code": "...", "message": "...", "details": {...}?}}`. Codes include `UNAUTHORIZED`, `VALIDATION_ERROR`, `INSUFFICIENT_CREDITS`, `STOCK_NOT_FOUND`, `PROFILE_PRIVATE`, and others—see the **ErrorResponse** schema.

## Trading model
Order endpoints **enqueue** work for the market tick worker; responses describe queued pending orders until settlement. Use **`idempotencyKey`** where documented to make retries safe.

get.description: Minimal JSON for uptime checks (no auth).
Same as `/`; kept for load balancer conventions.

post.description:
Bootstrap an internal account row keyed by `user_id`.

Duplicate `user_id` values receive **409 Conflict** — mobile clients should branch to login when appropriate.
New accounts receive **$2000** trading credits, matching the ``users.balance`` column default.

get.description: Hydrate the caller using bearer/`X-User-Id`; snake_case JSON (`UserResponse`).

patch.description: Partial updates — unset fields stay unchanged. Balance cannot be edited via this route.

post.description:
Issue presigned **PUT** + optimistic profile URL.

Flow: `PUT` binary bytes to `uploadUrl`, then refresh `/me` — CDN propagation may lag briefly.

Send a friend request.

If the inverse pending edge exists we flip it to **accepted** immediately (social symmetry shortcut).
Accept where `{requester_id}` originally invited the authenticated user.

get.description: Alias for ``GET /api/users/{userId}/friends`` using implicit auth id (no literal `me` path segment elsewhere).

parameters.name: stockID

schema.description: If set, each friend's highlighted position prefers this asset.
schema.title: Stockid

parameters.description: If set, each friend's highlighted position prefers this asset.

get.description: List accepted friends with one position each (largest holding, or filtered by stockID). Owner only.

schema.description: Optional asset filter for highlighted positions.
schema.title: Stockid

parameters.description: Optional asset filter for highlighted positions.

get.description: Public profile when is_public; owner always sees own profile.

put.description: Update profile (spec PUT). Must be authenticated as the same user.

get.description: Discovery helper returning `{marketId,name}` tuples for dropdowns.

schema.title: Response List Markets Api Markets  Get

get.description: Get market state. No auth.
List assets for a market. No auth.

schema.title: Response List Market Assets Api Markets  Market Id  Assets Get

get.description: Get full market (assets, prices, state). No per-user positions.
List current user's positions in this market. Auth required.

schema.title: Response List My Positions Api Markets  Market Id  Positions Get

post.description:
Queue buy/sell orders for the next market tick. All positions must belong to current user.
Auth required.

Optional ``idempotencyKey`` (8–128 chars): only with **exactly one** order in ``orders``.

Without a client key, a server **auto** idempotency key is still applied for a **single**
order so duplicate POSTs and calls that mirror ``POST /api/transactions`` in the same UTC
minute share one pending.

Use ``quantityUnit: usd`` and a signed dollar amount in ``deltaQuantity`` to match
``POST /api/transactions`` USD sizing for **buys** (cash out) and **sells** (cash in);
do **not** convert to shares client-side.
USD is only allowed when ``orders`` has length **1**.

get.description: Paginated discovery feed with optional league + fuzzy filters.

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Substring match on display name or asset id.
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Substring match on display name or asset id.

post.description: Create a new stock (asset). Auth required.

get.description: Get top gainers and losers by price change vs initial value. Public.
Get stocks sorted by total position quantity (volume proxy). Public.
Get stocks with positive price movement. Public.
Get stocks with negative price movement. Public.
Get a single stock by ID (numeric id or asset_id). Public.

patch.description: Update a stock by ID (numeric or asset_id). Auth required.

delete.description: Delete a stock by ID (numeric or asset_id). Auth required. Cascades to positions and asset_price.

get.description: Get mark price history after each settled tick (for charts). Public.
Get all leagues (markets). Public.

schema.title: Response List Leagues Api Leagues Get

get.description:
Inject league-configured Polymarket Gamma queries (`playoff`, `division`, `conference`, `champion`).

Forwards remaining query params verbatim (pagination, filters) just like `/api/polymarket/search`.
Hydrate league aggregate metrics + optional nested teams.
Get the authenticated user's portfolio. Auth required.

Same aggregate totals as `GET /api/portfolio` (exit-priced liquidation view), with a `period`
echo so clients can align with `/history` and stock charts. Tick snapshots use mark prices and
can diverge; these numbers always match the base portfolio endpoint.

`period`: `1H`, `1D`, `1W`, `1M`, `3M`, `1Y`, `5Y`, `ALL` — same as `/api/portfolio/history`
and stock price history.
Holdings table backing portfolio screens.
Get position for a specific stock (stock_id = asset_id). Auth required.

Time-series snapshots for charting.

Plot **gain/loss** metrics for performance; raw NAV climbs when deploying fresh capital—pair copy with `/metrics` for labeling.

parameters.name: period

schema.description: Window preset shared with stock charts (`1H`…`ALL`).
schema.title: Period

parameters.description: Window preset shared with stock charts (`1H`…`ALL`).

get.description: Cursor through settled fills for the authenticated user (not pending queue rows).

parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Rows to skip from newest-first ordering.
schema.title: Offset

parameters.description: Rows to skip from newest-first ordering.

post.description:
Queue a buy/sell for execution at the next market tick (by stock / asset_id). Auth required.

Use quantityUnit `shares` (default) when quantity is share count; use `usd` when quantity is
dollar notional — the server sizes **buy** and **sell** share amounts so tick **debit** /
**credit** matches that amount within about 1% (same ``P_entry`` / ``P_exit`` as settlement).

Optional body field ``idempotencyKey`` (8–128 chars): duplicate requests with the same key
return the original queued order so network retries / double-submits do not create extra pendings.
Without a client key, a per-minute server key applies; for ``quantityUnit: usd`` it hashes dollar
notional (not mark-converted shares) so retries after the mark moves still dedupe. Prefer a
fresh client key for each distinct buy/sell intent in production.

If the user has no existing PositionModel for this stock, a new position is
opened automatically with zero quantity before queueing the buy.

get.description: Get a single transaction by id. Auth required (own only).
Get bonus information (currently all zeros). Public.
Get wallet balances for a user. Auth required; may only request own wallet.

post.description: Purchase fan coins. Not implemented (dual-currency not in scope).

get.description: Get purchase history. Not implemented (dual-currency not in scope).

Cross-search stocks + leagues (≤50 hits each).

Results use camelCase team/league bodies identical to list/detail endpoints for straight rendering.

parameters.name: leagueID

schema.description: When searching stocks, restrict hits to this market/league id.
schema.title: Leagueid

parameters.description: When searching stocks, restrict hits to this market/league id.

post.description:
Follow a stock (`stockID` = asset id). Idempotent: repeating returns **201** with the same logical row
(existing `id` preserved).

get.description: All stocks the authenticated user follows, newest first.

post.description: Same as ``POST /api/follows`` with JSON body; convenience when the client puts `stockId` in the path.

get.description: Followed stocks the user does **not** currently hold (no position or quantity ≤ 0).

Proxy to Gamma ``GET /public-search``. Forwards all query parameters from the
request (including optional Gamma filters); ``q`` is validated here.

Pass-through to The Odds API v4. Example: ``GET /api/odds/v4/sports`` →
``GET https://api.the-odds-api.com/v4/sports`` with ``apiKey`` from the server.

volatility_params.title: Volatility Params
volatility_params.description: Opaque simulator tuning blob consumed server-side.

AssetResponse.title: AssetResponse
AssetResponse.description: Static asset metadata plus simulator knobs.

BonusInfo.title: BonusInfo
BonusInfo.description: Bonus information for purchases (currently all zeros).

stockID.title: Stockid
stockID.description: Asset id to follow (`stockID` in JSON).

followedAt.title: Followedat
followedAt.description: When the user followed (`followedAt` in JSON).

FriendEntry.title: FriendEntry
FriendEntry.description: One friend with a single highlighted position (GET /api/users/{userId}/friends).

status.title: Status
status.description: `pending`: request sent or awaiting acceptance; `accepted`: friendship active.

friendshipId.title: Friendshipid
friendshipId.description: Database id of the friendship row (`friendshipId` in JSON).

FriendRequestStatusResponse.title: FriendRequestStatusResponse
FriendRequestStatusResponse.description: Result of creating or accepting a friend request.

FriendsResponse.title: FriendsResponse
FriendsResponse.description: Friends list with one showcase position each (largest holding unless filtered).

market_id.title: Market Id
market_id.description: Same id used as `leagueId` in stock queries.

MarketResponse.title: MarketResponse
MarketResponse.description: Full market payload with parallel **prices** map keyed by ``asset_id``.

tick_index.title: Tick Index
tick_index.description: Monotonic tick counter advanced when orders settle.

last_updated.title: Last Updated
last_updated.description: Wall-clock timestamp of last tick metadata refresh.

virtual_liquidity.title: Virtual Liquidity
virtual_liquidity.description: Mechanism liquidity parameter driving marginal pricing.

MarketStateResponse.title: MarketStateResponse
MarketStateResponse.description: Market-wide simulator cadence and liquidity snapshot.

MoverItem.title: MoverItem
MoverItem.description: Stock with change info for top-movers / on-the-rise / upset-alert.

positionId.title: Positionid
positionId.description: Must belong to the caller inside this market.

deltaQuantity.title: Deltaquantity
deltaQuantity.description: Signed share delta, or signed USD notional when ``quantityUnit`` is ``usd`` (+ buy / - sell).

quantityUnit.title: Quantityunit
quantityUnit.description: `shares`: ``deltaQuantity`` is shares. `usd`: dollars — **buy** debit / **sell** credit matched like ``POST /api/transactions`` (~1%).

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: One delta applied to an existing ``position_id`` after auth checks.

OrdersQueuedResponse.title: OrdersQueuedResponse
OrdersQueuedResponse.description: Mirror of submitted deltas with assigned pending ids.

orders.title: Orders
orders.description: Non-empty list of deltas to queue atomically.

idempotencyKey.title: Idempotencykey
idempotencyKey.description: Allowed only when `orders` has length **1**; same semantics as transaction idempotency.

PaginatedPositions.title: PaginatedPositions
PaginatedPositions.description: Positions slice after optional sort applied server-side.

hasMore.title: Hasmore
hasMore.description: True when another page exists (`hasMore` in JSON).

PaginatedTransactions.title: PaginatedTransactions
PaginatedTransactions.description: Transactions newest-first with simple offset pagination.

PolymarketLeagueQueryKind.title: PolymarketLeagueQueryKind
PolymarketLeagueQueryKind.description: Selects one of the league's configured Polymarket search query templates.

totalValue.title: Totalvalue
totalValue.description: Sum of position values at current marks.

totalInvested.title: Totalinvested
totalInvested.description: Capital tied up / cost basis aggregate.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio
Portfolio.description: Aggregate snapshot — totals align with exit-priced liquidation view used elsewhere.

PortfolioHistoryPoint.title: PortfolioHistoryPoint
PortfolioHistoryPoint.description:
Portfolio snapshot over time.

For charts, plot `total_gain_loss` or `gain_loss_percentage` so moves reflect performance;
`total_value` moves when you deploy more capital into positions (buys), not just returns.
`change` / `change_percentage` are step deltas in P&L vs the prior point; the step % uses
prior `total_invested` when positive, otherwise prior `total_value` (so the first step after
a bad `invested=0` snapshot is still expressible as a %).

PortfolioMetricsResponse.title: PortfolioMetricsResponse
PortfolioMetricsResponse.description: Summary totals for a time window (aligned with GET /api/portfolio/history `period`).

avgEntryPrice.title: Avgentryprice
avgEntryPrice.description: Average cost per share for the open lot.

gainLossPercentage.title: Gainlosspercentage
gainLossPercentage.description: Percent return on invested capital when defined.

Position.title: Position
Position.description: One open holding with mark-to-market value and cost metrics.

position_id.title: Position Id
position_id.description: Deterministic id tying user + asset + venue semantics.

PositionResponse.title: PositionResponse
PositionResponse.description: Authoritative ledger row for a user's stake prior to aggregate portfolio recomputation.

QueuedMarketOrderItem.title: QueuedMarketOrderItem
QueuedMarketOrderItem.description: Single queue slot acknowledged back to the client.

pendingOrderId.title: Pendingorderid
pendingOrderId.description: Use to correlate with settlement logs (`pendingOrderId` in JSON).

status.title: Status
status.description: Always `pending` until the worker fills or rejects.

idempotencyKey.title: Idempotencykey
idempotencyKey.description: Echo of client key when supplied (`idempotencyKey` in JSON).

QueuedOrderResponse.title: QueuedOrderResponse
QueuedOrderResponse.description: Acknowledgement after queueing — execution happens on the periodic tick.

id.title: Id
id.description: Asset id; use as `stockId` on trading routes.

leagueId.title: Leagueid
leagueId.description: Parent market id (same as `market_id`; `leagueId` in JSON).

price.title: Price
price.description: Current simulated mark price for valuation.

Stock.title: Stock
Stock.description: Tradable team/asset with display metadata and latest **mark** price.

StockUpdate.title: StockUpdate
StockUpdate.description: Request body for PATCH /api/stocks/{stockId}. All fields optional.

idempotencyKey.title: Idempotencykey
idempotencyKey.description: Client key if supplied when queueing; echoed for correlation.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Settled trade ledger row after tick execution.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: Size: share count or USD notional (`quantityUnit`). For USD **buys**, shares sized so **debit** ≈ this amount; for USD **sells**, shares sized so **credit** ≈ this amount (~1%).

price.title: Price
price.description: Ignored for pricing; execution uses internal market mechanics.

quantityUnit.title: Quantityunit
quantityUnit.description: `shares`: `quantity` is share count. `usd`: `quantity` is dollar notional converted to shares at the current mark before queueing (`quantityUnit` in JSON).

idempotencyKey.title: Idempotencykey
idempotencyKey.description: Optional 8–128 char key; retries with the same key replay the first queued pending (`idempotencyKey` in JSON).

TransactionCreate.title: TransactionCreate
TransactionCreate.description: Queue a trade for the next market tick (`POST /api/transactions`).

success.title: Success
success.description: True when a follow row was removed.

filename.title: Filename
filename.description: Original filename; used in stored object key.

contentType.title: Contenttype
contentType.description: Must match the `Content-Type` header on the subsequent PUT.

UploadUrlRequest.title: UploadUrlRequest
UploadUrlRequest.description: Ask for a short-lived **PUT** URL to upload a profile image binary.

expiresIn.title: Expiresin
expiresIn.description: TTL seconds for the presigned URL (`expiresIn` in JSON).

UploadUrlResponse.title: UploadUrlResponse
UploadUrlResponse.description: Upload instructions — ``PUT`` the raw bytes to ``uploadUrl`` before it expires.

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name; split into first/last server-side when absent.

UserCreate.title: UserCreate
UserCreate.description: Initial signup payload; starting balance is set server-side (DB default / registration flow).

id.title: Id
id.description: Stable user id (e.g. Cognito `sub`), opaque string.

birthday.title: Birthday
birthday.description: Birthday when set; may be date-only serialized.

public.title: Public
public.description: If false, only the owner may read full profile.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Public user profile surfaced at ``GET|PUT /api/users/{userId}`` (camelCase JSON).

UserProfileUpdate.title: UserProfileUpdate
UserProfileUpdate.description: Partial update for ``PUT /api/users/{userId}``; omit fields you do not change.

balance.title: Balance
balance.description: Trading credits available for buys (maps to `UserModel.balance`).

is_public.title: Is Public
is_public.description: Whether anonymous viewers may see public profile fields.

UserUpdate.title: UserUpdate
UserUpdate.description: Patch self profile — omit fields you are not changing. Cannot change balance via API.

tradingCredits.title: Tradingcredits
tradingCredits.description: Spendable simulated balance for buys (`tradingCredits` in JSON).

Wallet.title: Wallet
Wallet.description: Balances returned from ``GET /api/wallet/{userId}`` (must match authenticated user).

HTTPBearer.description: Cognito ID token (production) or dev substitute when `DEV_USE_X_USER_ID` is set (`X-User-Id` header). Format: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

tags.name: users
tags.description: Registration (`POST /api/users`), authenticated account (`/me`), public profiles (`GET|PUT /api/users/{userId}`), profile picture presigned uploads, and friend requests. `userId` values are opaque strings (e.g. Cognito `sub`), not integers.

tags.name: markets
tags.description: Market discovery, live state, asset listings, **your** positions in a market (auth), and **batch** order queue by `positionId` + `deltaQuantity`. Prefer `POST /api/transactions` for app-style trades keyed by `stockId`.

tags.name: stocks
tags.description: Paginated stock lists, detail by `stockId` (numeric DB id or string `asset_id`), price history, movers/volume feeds, and admin CRUD (auth). `leagueID` query params filter by market id.

tags.name: leagues
tags.description: Leagues mirror markets (`league_id` = `market_id`). Optional `includeStocks` embeds teams; Polymarket search helpers per league.

tags.name: portfolio
tags.description: Authenticated aggregate portfolio, positions, per-stock position, history snapshots, and metrics (aligned `period` with charts).

tags.name: transactions
tags.description: List and fetch settled trades; **queue** new buys/sells for the next tick via `stockId` + `quantity` + optional `quantityUnit` (`shares` | `usd`) and `idempotencyKey`.

tags.name: wallet
tags.description: Trading credits balance for the authenticated user (`tradingCredits`); bonus stubs and unimplemented purchase endpoints.

tags.name: search
tags.description: Cross-search stocks and leagues; optional `leagueID` narrows stock hits.

tags.name: follows
tags.description: Authenticated watchlist: follow/unfollow by `stockId` (asset id), list follows, and `/not-owned` for followed teams without an open position (`quantity` > 0).

tags.name: polymarket
tags.description: Server-side proxy to Polymarket Gamma `public-search`; forwards query params.

tags.name: odds
tags.description: Pass-through to The Odds API v4; server injects `apiKey`. Paths mirror upstream after `/api/odds/v4/`.
